Description: Eiffel Tower in Paris, an iconic symbol of romance and French culture. I've always dreamed of seeing it lit up at night.
Mount Fuji viewed from Lake Kawaguchi, a serene and spiritual symbol of Japan.
Machu Picchu, Peru – a mystical Incan city high in the Andes mountains, inspiring awe and adventure.
New York City skyline – the vibrant energy of the city that never sleeps.
Santorini, Greece – the stunning white buildings with blue domes over the Aegean Sea evoke peace and love.
Northern Lights in Iceland – an awe-inspiring natural phenomenon I’ve always wanted to witness.
Cappadocia, Turkey – floating in a hot air balloon over fairy chimneys looks magical.
Petra, Jordan – the rose-red ancient city carved into rock, full of history and mystery.
Victoria Falls on the border of Zimbabwe and Zambia – one of the largest and most powerful waterfalls on Earth.
Great Barrier Reef, Australia – a vibrant underwater world teeming with marine life.
